title: Review requirements before closing analysis
story: As a framework user, I want to see a summary of the captured requirements after analysis so that I can confirm they match my intent before implementation begins.
acceptance_criteria: Requirements summary is presented with FR IDs, titles, priorities, and key ACs
I can choose Accept to confirm or Amend to make changes
The summary includes the core problem statement and user types

title: Review architecture before closing analysis
story: As a framework user, I want to see a summary of the architecture decisions after analysis so that I can verify the technical approach is sound before implementation begins.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture summary shows key decisions with chosen option and rationale
Integration points are visible
I can choose Accept or Amend

title: Review design with data flow before closing analysis
story: As a framework user, I want to see a summary of the design including data flow and sequence of operations so that I can verify the system will work as I expect.
acceptance_criteria: Design summary includes module responsibilities, data flow, and operation sequence
I can choose Accept or Amend
References to detailed design artifacts are included

title: Amend analysis output with full team
story: As a framework user, I want to amend any part of the analysis and have all three personas help me make changes so that amendments are consistent across requirements, architecture, and design.
acceptance_criteria: All three personas participate in the amendment conversation
After amendment, the full confirmation sequence restarts from requirements
Updated summaries reflect the amended artifact content

title: Appropriate confirmation for my analysis tier
story: As a framework user, I want the confirmation experience to match the depth of my analysis so that trivial changes don't require formal acceptance and light changes skip irrelevant domains.
acceptance_criteria: Standard/epic: requirements, architecture, and design summaries with Accept/Amend
Light: requirements and design summaries only, architecture skipped
Trivial: brief mention of changes, no formal acceptance

title: Fast revisit of previously accepted analysis
story: As a framework user, I want summaries to be saved after I accept them so that I can quickly review what was decided when I come back to the same item later.
acceptance_criteria: Summaries are persisted as markdown files in the artifact folder
Persisted summaries are available on revisit without regeneration
Summary files are standalone and reference detailed artifacts

title: Provenance of acceptance
story: As a framework user, I want a record of when I accepted the analysis output so that there is provenance for the analysis decision.
acceptance_criteria: Meta.json includes acceptance timestamp and accepted domains
Amendment cycle count is recorded
Acceptance state does not gate the build flow
